overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a dark robe with a yellow house crest exploring a gothic castle interior. The environment features stone corridors, staircases, torch-lit halls with vaulted ceilings, and a medieval kitchen area with fireplaces and wooden furniture.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone balcony corridor with overlooking railing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a stone balcony corridor with a decorative railing on the right side overlooking a lower level

entered.detail: ornate stone balustrade running along the right side of the corridor overlooking a lower level
large gothic archway at the end of the corridor leading to the staircase
burning torch mounted on the stone wall providing warm orange light
weathered stone tile flooring with moss and cracks

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow stone balcony corridor with an ornate railing on the right overlooking a lower level. Wall torches provide warm lighting against the grey stone walls and floor, with a large archway visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase ascending to upper level

events.description: character transitions from walking on flat ground to ascending a wide stone staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing a wide stone staircase with decorative railings on both sides toward an upper level

entered.detail: wide stone stairs with worn steps leading upward to a higher level
stone balustrade on the left side of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide stone staircase with decorative railings. The wall torches shift from the left to the right side as the character climbs, and the balcony railing disappears behind as the stairs lead upward toward a grand hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hall with high vaulted ceiling and chandelier

events.description: character enters a large grand hall with high ceilings and a central chandelier from the staircase

agents.ego_description: walking through a spacious grand hall, passing under a large chandelier and approaching a stone statue against the wall

entered.detail: large circular metal chandelier with multiple candles hanging from the vaulted ceiling
high arched stone ceiling with ribbed gothic vaulting
tall stone statue of a robed figure on a pedestal against the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a grand hall with a high vaulted ceiling and a large ornate chandelier hanging overhead. The space opens up significantly, revealing a stone statue against the right wall as the character walks across the hall toward another archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval kitchen or dining room with fireplace

events.description: character enters a smaller room with a large fireplace and wooden dining furniture
character turns around and begins walking back toward the room entrance

agents.ego_description: entering a kitchen area, walking past a wooden table toward a lit fireplace, then turning to survey the room before exiting

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning fire and a cooking pot hanging inside
long wooden table with benches in the center of the room
pile of chopped firewood stacked against the wall near the fireplace
built-in stone shelves holding various items along the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a medieval kitchen or dining room featuring a large stone fireplace with a burning fire, a long wooden dining table, and stacked firewood. The character explores the room, walking toward the fireplace before turning around to head back toward the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: returning through grand hall toward corridor

events.description: character exits the kitchen and re-enters the grand hall with the chandelier

agents.ego_description: walking back through the grand hall toward a distant archway leading to another corridor

entered.detail: large circular metal chandelier with multiple candles hanging from the vaulted ceiling
high arched stone ceiling with ribbed gothic vaulting

segments.scene_description: The character exits the kitchen and returns to the grand hall, with the ornate chandelier and vaulted ceiling coming back into view. The character continues walking toward a distant archway leading to another corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gothic castle that transitions from narrow, torch-lit corridors into a vast grand hall and a rustic medieval kitchen. It begins with the character walking along a stone balcony corridor overlooking a lower level, moving toward a distant archway under the warm glow of wall torches. As the character ascends a wide stone staircase, the perspective shifts upward and the balcony recedes, leading directly into a grand hall defined by a high vaulted ceiling and a massive ornate chandelier. The scene then expands further as the character passes a stone statue and enters a medieval kitchen featuring a burning stone fireplace and a long wooden table, before turning back to exit the room. Finally, the camera returns to the open space of the grand hall, moving past the chandelier once more toward another distant archway.
